text: Our attendance management system uses facial recognition to verify employee identity at site entry points; a secondary AI module produces a worker productivity score from movement patterns and machine interaction frequency that feeds into quarterly performance reviews.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: employment + biometric — behavioural scoring affects employment decisions

text: The school district's AI-powered early-warning system analyses two years of academic history, behaviour incident reports, and attendance patterns to generate a dropout-likelihood score for each enrolled student; counsellors receive a ranked list of students requiring intervention.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: EDUCATION — student scoring with significant effects

text: Our HR recruitment module ranks shortlisted applicants by a predicted job-performance score derived from psychometric test results, work-history analysis, and a language model assessment of application essays; hiring managers receive the ranked list before conducting interviews.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: EMPLOYMENT — automated ranking affects hiring outcome

text: The welfare-benefits eligibility platform assesses applications for housing vouchers, food assistance, and unemployment support using a machine-learning model trained on historical claimant data; the score determines whether the application is fast-tracked, manually reviewed, or automatically declined.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: ESSENTIAL_SERVICES — financial/social benefits with significant effect on persons

text: The predictive crime-risk scoring tool used by municipal police assigns numerical risk scores to residential postcodes and named individuals based on prior incident records, arrest history, and socioeconomic indicators; patrol allocation and proactive interview decisions are informed by these scores.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: LAW_ENFORCEMENT — individual risk scoring for law enforcement action

text: The AI-powered visa application screening system processes passport data, travel history, declared financial circumstances, and country-of-origin risk indicators to produce a preliminary recommendation of approve, refer for interview, or reject, which immigration officers use as the starting point for their review.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: MIGRATION — visa and residency decisions affecting fundamental rights

text: The AI model continuously monitors water treatment plant sensor data across 47 measurement points and autonomously adjusts chemical dosing rates and pressure valves in real time; human operators are notified only when the model's confidence falls below 0.80 or a parameter exceeds a safety threshold.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: CRITICAL_INFRASTRUCTURE — safety-critical automated control of public water supply

text: The sentencing support tool analyses case characteristics, offence history, victim impact statements, and demographic context to suggest a recommended sentence range and flag aggravating or mitigating factors; it is used in pre-sentencing reports presented to the judge.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: JUSTICE — affects judicial outcomes

text: Our AI-based diagnostic imaging system automatically analyses chest CT scans for signs of pulmonary nodules and produces a structured radiology report with malignancy probability scores; it holds CE marking under the EU Medical Device Regulation Class IIa and was assessed by a notified body.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: medical device AI — CE marking Class IIa, notified body assessed

text: The creditworthiness assessment module generates a three-tier credit score for mortgage and personal loan applications; the score determines the interest rate band offered and whether the application proceeds to underwriting or is automatically declined at the front-end.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: ESSENTIAL_SERVICES — creditworthiness scoring for financial access

text: Our electricity grid load-balancing AI monitors real-time consumption data across regional substations and autonomously reroutes supply, triggers demand-response contracts, and initiates controlled shedding events to prevent uncontrolled blackouts.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: CRITICAL_INFRASTRUCTURE — autonomous control of electricity network

text: The parole risk assessment tool scores incarcerated individuals on recidivism likelihood using a model trained on release outcome data; the score is included in the parole board dossier and influences the board's decision on conditional release conditions and timeline.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: JUSTICE + LAW_ENFORCEMENT — recidivism scoring affects liberty

text: Our automated border-control kiosk uses facial recognition to match travellers against the immigration watchlist in real time; flagged individuals are immediately detained by the border force officer stationed at the adjacent desk pending manual identity verification.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: MIGRATION + biometric identification — RT biometric in border control

text: The CE-marked robotic surgery assistance system uses AI to guide instrument placement during minimally invasive cardiac procedures; it incorporates a safety interlock component that was evaluated by a notified body under Annex IX of the EU Medical Device Regulation.
label: high_risk
note: Annex I safety component — notified body, MDR, CE marking; ≥2 Article 6(1) signals

text: The insurance underwriting AI scores health insurance applications by predicted lifetime claim cost, using applicant-submitted health questionnaires, postcode-level health statistics, and aggregated wearable device data; the score drives premium banding and coverage exclusion decisions.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: ESSENTIAL_SERVICES — health insurance pricing affecting access

text: Das KI-System zur Bewerbungsauswahl unseres Unternehmens analysiert Lebensläufe, Anschreiben und Testergebnisse und erstellt eine Rangfolge der Kandidaten nach ihrem prognostizierten Arbeitserfolg; die ersten zwanzig Kandidaten der Rangliste werden zum Vorstellungsgespräch eingeladen.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: EMPLOYMENT — German recruitment ranking AI

text: Das biometrische Zutrittssystem in unserem Kernkraftwerk scannt die Gesichtszüge jeder Person, die das Sicherheitsgelände betritt, und gleicht sie mit der genehmigten Personenliste ab; bei Nichtübereinstimmung wird automatisch Alarm ausgelöst.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: CRITICAL_INFRASTRUCTURE + biometric — nuclear facility access control

text: The adaptive tutoring platform uses AI to classify each student's current cognitive state and dynamically adjusts the difficulty and pacing of learning materials; it also generates a weekly report for teachers that ranks students by predicted examination performance.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: EDUCATION — AI determines educational pathway; teacher ranking report has significant effects

text: The asylum case prioritisation system scores applications based on country-of-origin conditions, travel route data, and document authenticity signals, producing a processing-priority tier that determines how quickly an asylum case is scheduled for the initial interview.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: MIGRATION — scheduling priority affects asylum outcome timeline

text: Our AI-assisted worker performance evaluation module aggregates output metrics, error rates, peer feedback scores, and idle-time logs into a monthly performance index; a score below the 20th percentile triggers a formal performance improvement plan initiation.
label: high_risk
note: Annex III: EMPLOYMENT — automated performance scoring triggers employment consequence

text: Our internal document search tool uses a fine-tuned language model to surface relevant contract clauses and precedent cases when a lawyer types a query; no decision is made by the model — it surfaces candidate documents for the lawyer's review.
label: not_high_risk
note: Legal document retrieval — assists professional, no binding output, no significant effect on persons

text: The product recommendation engine on our e-commerce platform analyses purchase history, browsing behaviour, and wishlist data to suggest items a customer might like; customers can dismiss recommendations at any time and the suggestions have no effect beyond influencing purchase browsing.
label: not_high_risk
note: Commercial recommendation — no significant effect on fundamental rights

text: Our invoice-processing pipeline uses computer vision to extract vendor name, invoice date, line-item descriptions, and total amounts from scanned supplier invoices; extracted fields are staged for finance team review before payment is approved.
label: not_high_risk
note: Document OCR — data extraction, human approves payment, no significant effect on persons

text: The predictive maintenance model monitors vibration, temperature, and current-draw sensors on injection-moulding machines and issues alerts when readings indicate a bearing failure is likely within the next 72 hours; maintenance technicians schedule the repair.
label: not_high_risk
note: Industrial equipment maintenance — no safety-critical control, no effect on persons' rights

text: Our customer churn prediction model scores existing subscribers on likelihood to cancel in the next 90 days; marketing operations uses the list to prioritise which customers to include in retention campaign outreach.
label: not_high_risk
note: HARD: involves persons but affects only marketing prioritisation — no significant effect on rights/safety

text: The IT service desk triage bot classifies incoming helpdesk tickets into hardware, software, network, or access-management categories and routes them to the appropriate specialist queue, reducing average first-response time.
label: not_high_risk
note: Internal IT routing — no effect on external persons or fundamental rights

text: Our email marketing personalisation module selects subject line variants and send-time windows for each subscriber segment based on historical open-rate data; A/B test results are reviewed by the campaign manager before wider rollout.
label: not_high_risk
note: Marketing personalisation — commercial context, no rights impact

text: The AI-assisted code review tool analyses pull requests for common security vulnerabilities, style guide violations, and test coverage gaps, and posts inline comments for the developer to address; the tool has no authority to block or merge code.
label: not_high_risk
note: Developer tooling — no binding decisions, no effect on persons outside the development team

text: Our meeting transcription service converts recorded audio of internal team calls into searchable text summaries and action-item lists; the output is shared only with meeting participants.
label: not_high_risk
note: Internal productivity tool — no decisions affecting rights

text: The internal expense-report fraud-detection model flags claims that deviate significantly from peer-group spending patterns for review by the finance compliance team; flagged reports are manually verified before any follow-up with the employee.
label: not_high_risk
note: HARD: involves employment but the AI only flags for human review — no automated action taken against the employee

text: Unser Kundenservice-Chatbot beantwortet häufig gestellte Fragen zu Produkten, Lieferzeiten und Rückgabebedingungen automatisch und leitet komplexere Anfragen an einen menschlichen Servicemitarbeiter weiter.
label: not_high_risk
note: German customer service chatbot — limited risk only

text: Die KI-gestützte Übersetzungssoftware übersetzt interne Kommunikation und technische Dokumente automatisch aus dem Deutschen ins Englische und umgekehrt; alle Übersetzungen werden vor der Versendung von einem Redakteur geprüft.
label: not_high_risk
note: German translation tool — editorial review before use, no rights impact

text: The AI model forecasts seasonal product demand across 2 000 SKUs three months ahead; the output is reviewed by the supply chain planning team, who adjust the proposed procurement orders based on promotional plans and market intelligence before committing.
label: not_high_risk
note: Inventory forecasting — no effect on persons' fundamental rights

text: The website personalisation engine selects which content tiles to show each visitor based on device type, inferred interest category, and scroll-depth signals from previous sessions; the system is used purely to increase content engagement metrics.
label: not_high_risk
note: HARD: involves behavioural inference but for editorial content only — no significant effect on rights

text: Our quality-control vision system inspects printed circuit boards on the manufacturing line for solder defects, missing components, and polarity errors; defective boards are flagged and diverted to a rework station staffed by a technician.
label: not_high_risk
note: HARD: industrial QC — product inspection, no effect on persons, not safety-critical infrastructure

text: The AI sentiment analysis module processes transcripts of completed customer support calls and assigns a satisfaction score to each interaction; results are used in aggregate to measure service quality and identify training topics for the support team.
label: not_high_risk
note: HARD: involves emotion/sentiment inference but for aggregate quality reporting only — no individual-level decisions

text: Our internal learning platform recommendation engine suggests online courses and certifications to employees based on their current role, completed learning history, and career goals entered in their profile; employees are free to follow or ignore the suggestions.
label: not_high_risk
note: HARD: involves employment context but only suggests voluntary training — no significant effect on employment terms

text: The AI-assisted scheduling assistant analyses calendar availability, meeting preferences, and travel time between locations to suggest optimal meeting slots; all bookings require manual confirmation by the organiser.
label: not_high_risk
note: Productivity assistant — no binding decisions, no rights impact

text: Our supply chain risk scoring tool aggregates delivery reliability scores, financial health indicators, and geographic concentration metrics for our top 200 suppliers and flags those above a risk threshold for quarterly review by the procurement team.
label: not_high_risk
note: B2B supply chain — affects commercial relationships not fundamental rights of natural persons

text: The travel booking AI suggests flight and hotel options within policy limits for requested business trips and routes requests that exceed per-diem thresholds to a manager for approval; the tool cannot approve travel independently.
label: not_high_risk
note: HARD: involves employee travel but only as a routing/suggestion tool — no significant employment decision
